recent: S10 (2026-07-02): shipped both P2 fixes + groomed PLG-4 to empty. fix-anthropic-direct-task-serialization â€” root cause: withAnthropicDirectMcpServers merges the in-process `relay` server (createToolServer().asMcpServer(), a circular SDK object with a `root` back-ref, minified 'HJ') into params.mcp_servers verbatim; the Messages API mcp_servers is for REMOTE URL connectors and the SDK JSON.stringifies the body â†’ crash before the model call on EVERY task. Relay tools already served locally via forProvider('anthropic')+executeHandler, so injection was crashing AND redundant. Fix: mcpServersToAnthropicConnectors projects the merge to the URL-connector shape (skips relay + local stdio), mirrors openai-direct's mcpServersToOpenAiTools. Regression test builds the exact cycle; real dev-server anthropic-direct task now completes (result 'ok'). fix-inbox-checkpoint-realtime â€” InboxList+UnreadBadge polled 10s, never subscribed to a stream, so HITL checkpoints surfaced ~10-15s late; both now subscribe to the existing /api/notifications/pending-approvals/stream (~750ms tail, carries WorkflowCheckpoint rows) as an invalidation trigger and re-pull the authoritative list â€” /api/notifications stays the single render source, poll kept as fallback. 741ms insertâ†’emit smoke. 51/51 runtime+notifications tests pass. Commits 705d095a/1b10404e/891e759b. Memory: anthropic-direct-mcp-servers-remote-only
